name: Meringues (Plain and Chocolate Filled)
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Bittersweet chocolate, broken in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 225°F.
2. Have egg whites at about 70°F.
3. Beat egg whites until foamy using an electric mixer or by hand.
4. Add vanilla while continuing to beat.
5. Gradually add sugar, one tablespoon at a time, while beating.
6. When the mixture forms stiff peaks on the beater, it is ready for baking.
7. Fill a pastry bag with the mixture and pipe onto parchment-covered baking sheets using star tips to create "kisses."
8. Bake for about 1 hour or longer, depending on size. Do not remove from the oven at once; turn off the oven, open the door, and leave them in for at least 5 minutes.
9. Cool gradually away from a draft.
10. Remove from the sheet when cool.
11. To prepare chocolate ganache, pour hot scalded cream over chocolate and blend until smooth. Allow to cool.
12. Fill meringues by crushing the bottom lightly with the thumb while still warm and filling hollows with chocolate ganache.
Yield: 3 dozen 1-inch Meringues
